subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! Thy letter that thou didst write from Paris was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی مکتوبی که از پاریس مرقوم نموده بودید رسید
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @effort; striving
